targets.rawSql:
DECLARE @xe_path NVARCHAR(260)

SELECT 
    @xe_path=target_data_xml.value('(EventFileTarget/File/@name)[1]', 'nvarchar(4000)') 
FROM sys.dm_xe_sessions AS s
JOIN sys.dm_xe_session_targets AS t
    ON s.address = t.event_session_address
CROSS APPLY (SELECT CAST(t.target_data AS XML)) AS x(target_data_xml)
WHERE t.target_name = 'event_file' and s.name like '%BlockedProcessReport%';

SELECT 
    event_data = CAST(event_data AS XML)
	INTO #BlockedEvents
FROM sys.fn_xe_file_target_read_file(
    @xe_path,
    NULL, NULL, NULL);

;WITH BlockRelations AS
(
    SELECT
        Event_Data.value('(event/data[@name="database_name"]/value)[1]', 'sysname') AS DatabaseName,

        -- Infos Blocked
        BP.value('@spid', 'int')                 AS BlockedSPID,
        BP.value('@hostname', 'nvarchar(128)')   AS BlockedHost,
        BP.value('@loginname', 'nvarchar(128)')  AS BlockedLogin,
        BP.value('@clientapp', 'nvarchar(256)')  AS BlockedApp,
        BP.value('inputbuf[1]', 'nvarchar(max)') AS BlockedSQL,

        -- Infos Blocking
        BL.value('@spid', 'int')                 AS BlockingSPID,
        BL.value('@hostname', 'nvarchar(128)')   AS BlockingHost,
        BL.value('@loginname', 'nvarchar(128)')  AS BlockingLogin,
        BL.value('@clientapp', 'nvarchar(256)')  AS BlockingApp,
        BL.value('inputbuf[1]', 'nvarchar(max)') AS BlockingSQL
    FROM #BlockedEvents
    CROSS APPLY Event_Data.nodes('/event') AS E(X)
    CROSS APPLY E.X.nodes('data[@name="blocked_process"]/value/blocked-process-report/blocked-process/process') AS BPNode(BP)
    CROSS APPLY E.X.nodes('data[@name="blocked_process"]/value/blocked-process-report/blocking-process/process') AS BLNode(BL)
)
SELECT TOP 20
    COUNT(*) AS NbOccurrences,
    DatabaseName,

    -- Identit  du bloqu 
    BlockedLogin,
    BlockedHost,
    BlockedApp,
    BlockedSQL,

    -- Identit  du bloqueur
    BlockingLogin,
    BlockingHost,
    BlockingApp,
    BlockingSQL
FROM BlockRelations
GROUP BY DatabaseName,
         BlockedLogin, BlockedHost, BlockedApp, BlockedSQL,
         BlockingLogin, BlockingHost, BlockingApp, BlockingSQL
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

select Name,Value,Value_in_use, Description from sys.configurations where name in ('max degree of parallelism',
'max server memory (MB)',
'min server memory (MB)',
'network packet size (B)',
'remote query timeout (s)',
'cost threshold for parallelism') order by Name

SELECT * FROM [AdminSQLCentral].[dbo].[Server_SA] A
LEFT OUTER  JOIN 
[Inventory].[ServerList] B ON substring(b.Servername,1,charindex('\',b.ServerName)-1)  = A.SERVER_NAME 
WHERE B.ServerName IN ($Datasource)

SELECT t1.resource_type AS [lock type], DB_NAME(resource_database_id) AS [database],
t1.resource_associated_entity_id AS [blk object],t1.request_mode AS [lock req],  --- lock requested
t1.request_session_id AS [waiter sid], t2.wait_duration_ms AS [wait time],       -- spid of waiter  
(SELECT [text] FROM sys.dm_exec_requests AS r WITH (NOLOCK)                      -- get sql for waiter
CROSS APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(r.[sql_handle]) 
WHERE r.session_id = t1.request_session_id) AS [waiter_batch],
(SELECT SUBSTRING(qt.[text],r.statement_start_offset/2, 
    (CASE WHEN r.statement_end_offset = -1 
    THEN LEN(CONVERT(nvarchar(max), qt.[text])) * 2 
    ELSE r.statement_end_offset END - r.statement_start_offset)/2) 
FROM sys.dm_exec_requests AS r WITH (NOLOCK)
CROSS APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(r.[sql_handle]) AS qt
WHERE r.session_id = t1.request_session_id) AS [waiter_stmt],					-- statement blocked
t2.blocking_session_id AS [blocker sid],										-- spid of blocker
(SELECT [text] FROM sys.sysprocesses AS p										-- get sql for blocker
CROSS APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(p.[sql_handle]) 
WHERE p.spid = t2.blocking_session_id) AS [blocker_stmt]
FROM sys.dm_tran_locks AS t1 WITH (NOLOCK)
INNER JOIN sys.dm_os_waiting_tasks AS t2 WITH (NOLOCK)
ON t1.lock_owner_address = t2.resource_address OPTION (RECOMPILE);

SET NOCOUNT ON

SELECT SPID, BLOCKED, REPLACE (REPLACE (T.TEXT, CHAR(10), ' '), CHAR (13), ' ' ) AS BATCH
INTO #T
FROM sys.sysprocesses R CROSS APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(R.SQL_HANDLE) T

;WITH BLOCKERS (SPID, BLOCKED, LEVEL, BATCH)
AS
(
SELECT SPID,
BLOCKED,
CAST (REPLICATE ('0', 4-LEN (CAST (SPID AS VARCHAR))) + CAST (SPID AS VARCHAR) AS VARCHAR (1000)) AS LEVEL,
BATCH FROM #T R
WHERE (BLOCKED = 0 OR BLOCKED = SPID)
AND EXISTS (SELECT * FROM #T R2 WHERE R2.BLOCKED = R.SPID AND R2.BLOCKED <> R2.SPID)
UNION ALL
SELECT R.SPID,
R.BLOCKED,
CAST (BLOCKERS.LEVEL + RIGHT (CAST ((1000 + R.SPID) AS VARCHAR (100)), 4) AS VARCHAR (1000)) AS LEVEL,
R.BATCH FROM #T AS R
INNER JOIN BLOCKERS ON R.BLOCKED = BLOCKERS.SPID WHERE R.BLOCKED > 0 AND R.BLOCKED <> R.SPID
)
SELECT N'    ' + REPLICATE (N'|         ', LEN (LEVEL)/4 - 1) +
CASE WHEN (LEN(LEVEL)/4 - 1) = 0
THEN 'HEAD -  '
ELSE '|------  ' END
+ CAST (SPID AS NVARCHAR (10)) + N' ' + BATCH AS BLOCKING_TREE
FROM BLOCKERS ORDER BY LEVEL ASC

DROP TABLE #T
SELECT DATEDIFF(MINUTE,sqlserver_start_time,GETUTCDATE()) FROM sys.dm_os_sys_info;

SELECT cpu_count AS [Logical CPU Count]
FROM sys.dm_os_sys_info WITH (NOLOCK) OPTION (RECOMPILE);

SELECT getdate() AS time, CAST(value_in_use AS INT) AS Value
FROM sys.configurations WITH (NOLOCK)
WHERE name = 'min server memory (MB)'
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT getdate() AS time, CAST(value_in_use AS INT) AS Value
FROM sys.configurations WITH (NOLOCK)
WHERE name = 'max server memory (MB)'
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT total_physical_memory_kb 
FROM sys.dm_os_sys_memory

SELECT available_physical_memory_kb 
FROM sys.dm_os_sys_memory
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys.databases WHERE database_id > 4

SELECT ec.client_net_address, es.[program_name], es.[host_name], es.login_name, 
COUNT(ec.session_id) AS [connection count] 
FROM sys.dm_exec_sessions AS es WITH (NOLOCK) 
INNER JOIN sys.dm_exec_connections AS ec WITH (NOLOCK) 
ON es.session_id = ec.session_id 
GROUP BY ec.client_net_address, es.[program_name], es.[host_name], es.login_name  
ORDER BY [connection count] DESC  OPTION (RECOMPILE);

SELECT  CheckDateTime as time,
        CounterName,
		CounterValue AS Value
    FROM [Archive].PerformanceCounter
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
	AND CounterName IN ('User Connections')
	ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT S.Severity
	 , ISNULL([Count], 0) AS [Count]
FROM
(
	SELECT Severity
		 , COUNT(DISTINCT name) AS [Count]
	FROM Monitoring.Alert
	WHERE $__timeFilter(CreateDateTime)
	GROUP BY Severity
) AS A
RIGHT JOIN Report.V_Severity AS S ON A.Severity = S.Severity

SELECT CreateDateTime AS time, 
       Name, 
       COUNT(*) AlertCount
FROM [Monitoring].[Alert]
WHERE $__timeFilter(CreateDateTime)
GROUP BY CreateDateTime,Name 
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT CheckDateTime AS time
  ,SQLProcessUtilization
  ,OtherProcessUtilization
	,SQLProcessUtilization+OtherProcessUtilization AS TotalProcessUtilization
--	,SystemIdle
FROM Archive.ProcessUtilization
WHERE $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)

panels.description:
Task > 10 = Blocking/Deadlocking  
Runnable > 1 = CPU Pressure  
PendingDiskIO > 1 = Disk Pressure

targets.rawSql:
SELECT CheckDateTime AS time
	,[AverageTaskCount]
	,[AverageRunnableTaskCount]
	,[AveragePendingDiskIOCount]
FROM Archive.Schedulers
WHERE $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)

panels.title: Schedulers

targets.rawSql:
SELECT  CheckDateTime as time,
        CounterName,
		CounterValue AS Value
    FROM [Archive].PerformanceCounter
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
	AND CounterName IN ('Total Server Memory (KB)','Lock Memory (KB)','Connection Memory (KB)','Database Cache Memory (KB)')
	ORDER BY time ASC

;WITH SQLStatistics AS
(
    SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            ORDER BY CheckDateTime ASC
            ) AS ID,
		CheckDateTime,
        CounterName,
		CounterValue
    FROM [Archive].PerformanceCounter
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
	AND CounterName IN ('Lazy writes/sec')
)
SELECT a.CheckDateTime AS time,
	     a.CounterName,
       (a.[CounterValue] - aPrior.[CounterValue])/DATEDIFF(ss, aPrior.CheckDateTime, a.CheckDateTime) AS CounterValue
FROM SQLStatistics a
INNER JOIN SQLStatistics aPrior
ON a.CounterName = aPrior.CounterName
AND a.ID - 1 = aPrior.ID
WHERE a.[CounterValue] >= aPrior.[CounterValue]
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT  CheckDateTime as time,
        CounterName,
		CounterValue AS Value
    FROM [Archive].PerformanceCounter
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
	AND CounterName IN ('Memory Grants Pending')
	ORDER BY time ASC

panels.description: Calculated PLE per 4GB, threshold fixed at 300 seconds

targets.rawSql:
SELECT CheckDateTime as time,
InstanceName,
(PageLifeExpectancyDynamic) AS Value
FROM Archive.V_PageLifeExpectancy
WHERE $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Page Life Expectancy

targets.rawSql:
;WITH SQLStatistics AS
(
    SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            ORDER BY CheckDateTime ASC
            ) AS ID,
		CheckDateTime,
        CounterName,
		CounterValue
    FROM [Archive].PerformanceCounter
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
	AND CounterName IN ('Free list stalls/sec')
)
SELECT a.CheckDateTime AS time,
	     a.CounterName,
       (a.[CounterValue] - aPrior.[CounterValue])/DATEDIFF(ss, aPrior.CheckDateTime, a.CheckDateTime) AS CounterValue
FROM SQLStatistics a
INNER JOIN SQLStatistics aPrior
ON a.CounterName = aPrior.CounterName
AND a.ID - 1 = aPrior.ID
WHERE a.[CounterValue] >= aPrior.[CounterValue]
ORDER BY time ASC

;WITH DriveIOLatency AS
(
    SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            ORDER BY CheckDateTime ASC
            ) AS ID,
		    CheckDateTime,
        LEFT(UPPER(PhysicalName), 1) AS Drive,
        SUM(io_stall_read_ms) AS io_stall_read_ms,
        SUM(io_stall_write_ms) AS io_stall_write_ms,
        SUM(num_of_reads) AS num_of_reads,
		SUM(num_of_writes) AS num_of_writes
    FROM [Archive].[FileStatistics]
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
    GROUP BY CheckDateTime, LEFT(UPPER(PhysicalName), 1)
)
SELECT a.CheckDateTime AS time,
	     a.Drive,
       CASE WHEN(a.num_of_reads-aPrior.num_of_reads) = 0 THEN 0
       ELSE(a.io_stall_read_ms-aPrior.io_stall_read_ms)*1.0/(a.num_of_reads-aPrior.num_of_reads)*1.0 END AS ReadLatency,
       CASE WHEN(a.num_of_writes-aPrior.num_of_writes) = 0 THEN 0
       ELSE(a.io_stall_write_ms-aPrior.io_stall_write_ms)*1.0/(a.num_of_writes-aPrior.num_of_writes)*1.0 END AS WriteLatency
FROM DriveIOLatency a
INNER JOIN DriveIOLatency aPrior
ON a.Drive = aPrior.Drive
AND a.ID - 1 = aPrior.ID
WHERE a.num_of_reads >= aPrior.num_of_reads
AND a.num_of_writes >= aPrior.num_of_writes
ORDER BY time ASC

;WITH DriveIOIOPS AS
(
    SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            ORDER BY CheckDateTime ASC
            ) AS ID,
		    CheckDateTime,
        LEFT(UPPER(PhysicalName), 1) AS Drive,
        SUM(num_of_reads) AS num_of_reads,
		SUM(num_of_writes) AS num_of_writes
    FROM [Archive].[FileStatistics]
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
    GROUP BY CheckDateTime, LEFT(UPPER(PhysicalName), 1)
)
SELECT  a.CheckDateTime AS time,
	      a.Drive,
        (a.num_of_reads - aPrior.num_of_reads)*1.0/DATEDIFF(ss, aPrior.CheckDateTime, a.CheckDateTime) AS ReadIOPS,
        (a.num_of_writes - aPrior.num_of_writes)*1.0/DATEDIFF(ss, aPrior.CheckDateTime, a.CheckDateTime) AS WriteIOPS
FROM DriveIOIOPS a
INNER JOIN DriveIOIOPS aPrior
ON a.Drive = aPrior.Drive
AND a.ID - 1 = aPrior.ID
WHERE a.num_of_reads >= aPrior.num_of_reads
AND a.num_of_writes >= aPrior.num_of_writes
ORDER BY time ASC

;WITH DriveIOThroughput AS
(
    SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            ORDER BY CheckDateTime ASC
            ) AS ID,
		    CheckDateTime,
        LEFT(UPPER(PhysicalName), 1) AS Drive,
        SUM(num_of_bytes_read) AS num_of_bytes_read,
		SUM(num_of_bytes_written) AS num_of_bytes_written
    FROM [Archive].[FileStatistics]
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
    GROUP BY CheckDateTime, LEFT(UPPER(PhysicalName), 1)
)
SELECT  a.CheckDateTime AS time,
	      a.Drive,
        (a.num_of_bytes_read - aPrior.num_of_bytes_read)/1024/1024*1.0/DATEDIFF(ss, aPrior.CheckDateTime, a.CheckDateTime) AS ReadThroughputMBPS,
        (a.num_of_bytes_written - aPrior.num_of_bytes_written)/1024/1024*1.0/DATEDIFF(ss, aPrior.CheckDateTime, a.CheckDateTime) AS WriteThroughputMBPS
FROM DriveIOThroughput a
INNER JOIN DriveIOThroughput aPrior
ON a.Drive = aPrior.Drive
AND a.ID - 1 = aPrior.ID
WHERE a.num_of_bytes_read >= aPrior.num_of_bytes_read
AND a.num_of_bytes_written >= aPrior.num_of_bytes_written
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT [StartTime] AS time,
DatabaseName,
DATEDIFF(SECOND,StartTime,EndTime) Value
  FROM msdb.[dbo].[CommandLog]
  WHERE 1=1
AND CommandType IN ('BACKUP_DATABASE')
AND $__timeFilter(StartTime)
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT [StartTime] AS time,
DatabaseName,
DATEDIFF(SECOND,StartTime,EndTime) Value
  FROM MSDB.[dbo].[CommandLog]
  WHERE 1=1
AND CommandType IN ('DBCC_CHECKDB')
--AND Command LIKE '%DIFF%'
AND $__timeFilter(StartTime)
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT DATEADD(minute,DATEDIFF(minute,'2000-01-01',StartTime)/5*5,'2000-01-01') AS time,
DatabaseName,
DATEDIFF(SECOND,MIN(StartTime),MAX(EndTime)) Value
  FROM MSDB.[dbo].[CommandLog]
  WHERE 1=1
AND CommandType IN ('UPDATE_STATISTICS')
--AND Command LIKE '%DIFF%'
AND $__timeFilter(StartTime)
GROUP BY DATEADD(minute,DATEDIFF(minute,'2000-01-01',StartTime)/5*5,'2000-01-01'),DatabaseName
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT DATEADD(minute,DATEDIFF(minute,'2000-01-01',StartTime)/5*5,'2000-01-01') AS time,
DatabaseName,
DATEDIFF(SECOND,MIN(StartTime),MAX(EndTime)) Value
  FROM MSDB.[dbo].[CommandLog]
  WHERE 1=1
AND CommandType IN ('ALTER_INDEX')
--AND Command LIKE '%DIFF%'
AND $__timeFilter(StartTime)
GROUP BY DATEADD(minute,DATEDIFF(minute,'2000-01-01',StartTime)/5*5,'2000-01-01'),DatabaseName
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT sJOB.name AS JobName
		, msdb.dbo.agent_datetime(run_date, run_time) AS RunStartTime
		, ( run_duration / 10000 * 60 * 60 ) + ( run_duration / 100 % 100 * 60 ) + ( run_duration % 100 ) AS RunDuration --seconds
			, sJOBH.run_status AS RunStatus
			--, CASE WHEN sJOBH.run_status = 0 THEN 'Failed'
			--	   WHEN sJOBH.run_status = 1 THEN 'Succeeded'
			--	   WHEN sJOBH.run_status = 2 THEN 'Retry'
			--	   WHEN sJOBH.run_status = 3 THEN 'Canceled'
			--	   WHEN sJOBH.run_status = 4 THEN 'In Progress'
			--END AS RunStatus
	   FROM msdb.dbo.sysjobs AS sJOB
	   LEFT JOIN
	   (
		   SELECT job_id
				, step_name
				, run_date
				, run_time
				, run_status
				, run_duration
				, message
				, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY job_id
											   , step_id
				  ORDER BY run_date DESC
						 , run_time DESC) AS RowNumber
		   FROM msdb.dbo.sysjobhistory
		   WHERE step_id <> 0
	   ) AS sJOBH ON sJOB.job_id = sJOBH.job_id AND 
					 sJOBH.RowNumber = 1
	
	   WHERE sJOB.enabled = 1 AND 
	   ( sJOB.name LIKE 'DBA_SystemDatabaseBackup%'
	   OR sJOB.name LIKE 'DBA_UserDatabaseBackup%'
	   OR sJOB.name LIKE 'DBA_UpdateStatistics'
	   OR sJOB.Name LIKE 'DBA_SystemDatabaseIntegrityCheck'
	   OR sJOB.Name LIKE 'DBA_UserDatabaseIntegrityCheck'
	   OR sJOB.Name LIKE 'DBA_IndexMaintenance'
	   )
			 OPTION(RECOMPILE);

;WITH WaitStatistics AS
(
    SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            ORDER BY CheckDateTime ASC
            ) AS ID,
		CheckDateTime,
        WaitType,
		WaitCount,
		Wait_Seconds
    FROM [Archive].WaitStatistics
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
)
SELECT a.CheckDateTime AS time,
	   a.WaitType,
	   --(a.WaitCount - aPrior.WaitCount) AS WaitCountDelta,
       (a.[Wait_Seconds] - aPrior.[Wait_Seconds]) AS Value
FROM WaitStatistics a
INNER JOIN WaitStatistics aPrior
ON a.WaitType = aPrior.WaitType
AND a.ID - 1 = aPrior.ID
WHERE a.WaitCount >= aPrior.WaitCount
ORDER BY time ASC

;WITH WaitStatistics AS
(
    SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            ORDER BY CheckDateTime ASC
            ) AS ID,
		CheckDateTime,
    WaitType,
		WaitCount,
		Wait_Seconds
    FROM [Archive].WaitStatistics
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
)
SELECT a.CheckDateTime AS time,
	   a.WaitType,
    (a.[Wait_Seconds] - aPrior.[Wait_Seconds]) / NULLIF((a.[WaitCount] - aPrior.[WaitCount]),0) AS Value
FROM WaitStatistics a
INNER JOIN WaitStatistics aPrior
ON a.WaitType = aPrior.WaitType
AND a.ID - 1 = aPrior.ID
WHERE a.WaitCount >= aPrior.WaitCount
ORDER BY time ASC

;WITH WaitStatistics AS
(
    SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            ORDER BY CheckDateTime ASC
            ) AS ID,
		CheckDateTime,
        WaitType,
		WaitCount,
		Wait_Seconds,
		Signal_Seconds
    FROM [Archive].WaitStatistics
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
)
SELECT a.CheckDateTime AS time,
	   a.WaitType,
	   CAST(100.0 * SUM(a.Signal_Seconds-aPrior.Signal_Seconds) / NULLIF(SUM(a.Wait_Seconds-aPrior.Wait_Seconds),0) AS NUMERIC(20, 2)) AS [%signal (cpu) waits],
     CAST(100.0 * nullif(SUM((a.Wait_Seconds-aPrior.Wait_Seconds) - (a.Signal_Seconds-aPrior.Signal_Seconds)),0) / nullif(SUM((a.Wait_Seconds-aPrior.Wait_Seconds)),0) AS NUMERIC(20, 2)) AS [%resource waits]
FROM WaitStatistics a
INNER JOIN WaitStatistics aPrior
ON a.WaitType = aPrior.WaitType
AND a.ID - 1 = aPrior.ID
WHERE a.WaitCount >= aPrior.WaitCount
GROUP BY a.CheckDateTime,a.WaitType
ORDER BY time ASC

;WITH WaitStatistics AS
(
    SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            ORDER BY CheckDateTime ASC
            ) AS ID,
		CheckDateTime,
    WaitType,
		WaitCount,
		Wait_Seconds,
		Signal_Seconds
    FROM [Archive].WaitStatistics
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
)
SELECT a.CheckDateTime AS time,
	   CAST(100.0 * SUM(a.Signal_Seconds-aPrior.Signal_Seconds) / NULLIF(SUM(a.Wait_Seconds-aPrior.Wait_Seconds),0) AS NUMERIC(20, 2)) AS [%signal (cpu) waits],
     CAST(100.0 * SUM((a.Wait_Seconds-aPrior.Wait_Seconds) - (a.Signal_Seconds-aPrior.Signal_Seconds)) / SUM((a.Wait_Seconds-aPrior.Wait_Seconds)) AS NUMERIC(20, 2)) AS [%resource waits]
FROM WaitStatistics a
INNER JOIN WaitStatistics aPrior
ON a.WaitType = aPrior.WaitType
AND a.ID - 1 = aPrior.ID
WHERE a.WaitCount >= aPrior.WaitCount
GROUP BY a.CheckDateTime
ORDER BY time ASC

;WITH SQLStatistics AS
(
    SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            ORDER BY CheckDateTime ASC
            ) AS ID,
		CheckDateTime,
        CounterName,
		CounterValue
    FROM [Archive].PerformanceCounter
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
	AND CounterName IN ('Batch Requests/sec',
                         'SQL Compilations/sec',
                         'SQL Re-Compilations/sec')
)
SELECT a.CheckDateTime AS time,
	     a.CounterName,
       (a.[CounterValue] - aPrior.[CounterValue])
	   /
	   CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(ss, aPrior.CheckDateTime, a.CheckDateTime) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE DATEDIFF(ss, aPrior.CheckDateTime, a.CheckDateTime) END AS CounterValue
FROM SQLStatistics a
INNER JOIN SQLStatistics aPrior
ON a.CounterName = aPrior.CounterName
AND a.ID - 1 = aPrior.ID
WHERE a.[CounterValue] >= aPrior.[CounterValue]
ORDER BY time ASC

;WITH SQLStatistics AS
(
    SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            ORDER BY CheckDateTime ASC
            ) AS ID,
		CheckDateTime,
        CounterName,
		CounterValue
    FROM [Archive].PerformanceCounter
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
	AND CounterName IN ('Page Splits/sec')
)
SELECT a.CheckDateTime AS time,
	     a.CounterName,
       (a.[CounterValue] - aPrior.[CounterValue])/DATEDIFF(ss, aPrior.CheckDateTime, a.CheckDateTime) AS CounterValue
FROM SQLStatistics a
INNER JOIN SQLStatistics aPrior
ON a.CounterName = aPrior.CounterName
AND a.ID - 1 = aPrior.ID
WHERE a.[CounterValue] >= aPrior.[CounterValue]
ORDER BY time ASC

;WITH SQLStatistics AS
(
    SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            ORDER BY CheckDateTime ASC
            ) AS ID,
		CheckDateTime,
        CounterName,
		CounterValue
    FROM [Archive].PerformanceCounter
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
	AND CounterName IN ('Forwarded Records/sec')
)
SELECT a.CheckDateTime AS time,
	     a.CounterName,
       (a.[CounterValue] - aPrior.[CounterValue])/DATEDIFF(ss, aPrior.CheckDateTime, a.CheckDateTime) AS CounterValue
FROM SQLStatistics a
INNER JOIN SQLStatistics aPrior
ON a.CounterName = aPrior.CounterName
AND a.ID - 1 = aPrior.ID
WHERE a.[CounterValue] >= aPrior.[CounterValue]
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT CheckDateTime AS time, 
       DriveLetter,
       (TotalSizeMB - (TotalSizeMB - FreeSizeMB))*1.0/TotalSizeMB * 100.0 AS [Free%]
FROM Archive.DriveSize
WHERE 1=1
AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
AND (TotalSizeMB - (TotalSizeMB - FreeSizeMB))*1.0/TotalSizeMB * 100.0 < 20
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT CheckDateTime AS time, 
       DriveLetter,
       TotalSizeMB - FreeSizeMB AS UsedSizeMB
FROM Archive.DriveSize
WHERE 1=1
AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT  CheckDateTime as time,
        CounterName,
		CounterValue AS Value
    FROM [Archive].PerformanceCounter
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
	AND CounterName IN ('Processes blocked') 
	ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT DATEADD(MINUTE,DATEDIFF(MINUTE,'2000-01-01',EventTimeStamp)/15*15,'2000-01-01') AS time, 
       SUM(DurationMS/1000) AS Duration,
       SUM(TotalBlockCount) AS TotalBlockCount
FROM Archive.BlockedProcessReport
WHERE 1=1
AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
GROUP BY DATEADD(MINUTE,DATEDIFF(MINUTE,'2000-01-01',EventTimeStamp)/15*15,'2000-01-01')
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT EventTimeStamp,
       TotalBlockCount,
       BlockedProcess,
       BlockingProcess,
       BlockedClientApp,
       BlockedHostName,
       BlockedLoginName,
       BlockedIsolationLevel,
       BlockingClientApp,
       BlockingHostName,
       BlockingLoginName,
       BlockingIsolationLevel
FROM Archive.BlockedProcessReport
WHERE 1=1
AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)

;WITH SQLStatistics AS
(
    SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            ORDER BY CheckDateTime ASC
            ) AS ID,
		CheckDateTime,
        CounterName,
		CounterValue
    FROM [Archive].PerformanceCounter
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
	AND CounterName IN ('Number of Deadlocks/sec',
							'Lock Timeouts (timeout > 0)/sec')
)
SELECT a.CheckDateTime AS time,
	     a.CounterName,
       (a.[CounterValue] - aPrior.[CounterValue])/DATEDIFF(ss, aPrior.CheckDateTime, a.CheckDateTime) AS Value
FROM SQLStatistics a
INNER JOIN SQLStatistics aPrior
ON a.CounterName = aPrior.CounterName
AND a.ID - 1 = aPrior.ID
WHERE a.[CounterValue] >= aPrior.[CounterValue]
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT DATEADD(MINUTE,DATEDIFF(MINUTE,'2000-01-01',EventTimeStamp)/15*15,'2000-01-01') AS time, 
       COUNT(*) AS DeadlockCount
FROM Archive.XMLDeadlockReport
WHERE 1=1
AND $__timeFilter(EventTimeStamp)
GROUP BY DATEADD(MINUTE,DATEDIFF(MINUTE,'2000-01-01',EventTimeStamp)/15*15,'2000-01-01')
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT DATEADD(MINUTE,DATEDIFF(MINUTE,'2000-01-01',EventTimeStamp)/15*15,'2000-01-01') AS time, 
       LockedObject,
       COUNT(*) AS DeadlockCount
FROM Archive.XMLDeadlockReportShredded
WHERE 1=1
AND $__timeFilter(EventTimeStamp)
GROUP BY DATEADD(MINUTE,DATEDIFF(MINUTE,'2000-01-01',EventTimeStamp)/15*15,'2000-01-01'),LockedObject
ORDER BY time ASC

names: {Error="3701", ErrorMessage="Cannot drop the table '#tmp_sp_catalogs', because ", Severity="11"}

targets.rawSql:
SELECT DATEADD(MINUTE,DATEDIFF(MINUTE,'2000-01-01',EventTimeStamp)/15*15,'2000-01-01') AS time, 
       CAST(ErrorNumber AS VARCHAR(5)) AS Error,
       CAST(Severity AS VARCHAR(2)) AS Severity,
       CAST(ErrorMessage AS VARCHAR(50)) AS ErrorMessage,
       COUNT(*) AS Value
FROM Archive.ErrorReported E
WHERE 1=1
AND $__timeFilter(EventTimeStamp)
GROUP BY DATEADD(MINUTE,DATEDIFF(MINUTE,'2000-01-01',EventTimeStamp)/15*15,'2000-01-01'), CAST(ErrorNumber AS VARCHAR(5)), CAST(Severity AS VARCHAR(2)),CAST(ErrorMessage AS VARCHAR(50))
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT EventTimeStamp, 
       ErrorNumber,
       Severity,
       ErrorMessage,
       [SQLText],
       [ClientAppName], 
       [ClientHostName], 
       [DatabaseName], 
       [ServerPrincipalName]
FROM Archive.ErrorReported E
WHERE 1=1
AND $__timeFilter(EventTimeStamp)

SELECT [Event_Time]
      ,[Login]
      ,[RoleName]
      ,[ApplicationName]
      ,[HostName]
      ,[LogonName]
      ,[SessionLogonName]
      ,[SQL_Txt]
  FROM [dbo].[DBA_UserChanges] order by event_time

SELECT
  distinct local_tcp_port as value
FROM sys.dm_exec_connections where local_tcp_port is not null

Select *, 
case  
when DATEDIFF(DAY,GETDATE(),A.Last_Backup)<0 then 1
when DATEDIFF(DAY,GETDATE(),A.Last_Backup)=0 then 0
end
DateDiff FROM
(
	SELECT DB.name AS Database_Name
	,MAX(DB.recovery_model_desc) AS Recovery_Model
	,MAX(BS.backup_start_date) AS Last_Backup
	,MAX(CASE WHEN BS.type = 'D'
	THEN BS.backup_start_date END)
	AS Last_Full_backup,
	MAX(CASE WHEN BS.type = 'I'
	THEN BS.backup_start_date END)
	AS Last_Differential_backup
	,MAX(CASE WHEN BS.type = 'L'
	THEN BS.backup_start_date END)
	AS Last_Log_backup
	FROM sys.databases AS DB
	LEFT JOIN
	msdb.dbo.backupset AS BS
	ON BS.database_name = DB.name
	WHERE ISNULL(BS.is_damaged, 0) = 0
	GROUP BY DB.name
 ) AS A
 WHERE A.Database_Name<>'tempdb'
 	ORDER BY Last_Backup desc

list.definition:
SELECT ServerName 
FROM Inventory.ServerList 
WHERE
SupportGroup  LIKE 
  CASE
    WHEN $__user = 18 THEN 'DXC%'
    ELSE 'D%' END
